title: The Game-Players of Titan (Vintage Edition)
author: Philip K. Dick
card_summary: A 1963 novel set on an Earth depopulated by alien war, where survivors play a Monopoly-like game called Bluff with real property stakes, overseen by telepathic alien Vugs from Titan. This Vintage 2001 reprint edition runs 212 pages. One of Dick's mid-career explorations of game theory, deception, and alien manipulation.

assets.path: PaulPKDarchive/PKDpdf/Dick, Philip K - The Game-Players of Titan (1963_2001, Vintage) - libgen.li.pdf
